title: narcissus × odorus var. trilobus
intro: Narcissus × odorus var. trilobus, also known as the Tri-lobed Narcissus or Tri-lobed Jonquil, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus × odorus var. trilobus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. It is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the plant's flowers and leaves being used in herbal preparations.
